ops.text:
INVALIDATION (2026-07-09, post-hoc audit): all draft-conditioned E2 cells are invalid. Every one of the 637 cached greedy drafts is the byte-identical string '<think>

</think>

NO_STEER' — (a) the mlx chat template emits an empty think block even on the non-thinking 2507 checkpoint, and (b) the 120-iter budget LoRA (480/6082 examples seen, ~0.08 epoch) collapsed to constant NO_STEER under greedy decoding. The harness fire-check compared the RAW string to NO_STEER, so the think prefix made every draft count as a fire: standalone 'R 1.000 / P 0.584' and two_stage detection numbers are the LEXICAL GATE alone; all 66 judged 'drafts' were the constant string (66/66 losses meaningless). STILL VALID: gate-at-0.5 detection (P .564/R .660/F1 .608, fire@no-steer .192) and the no-draft frontier cells. REQUIRED RERUN: strip think blocks + robust NO_STEER parse in harness; retrain >=1 epoch (~1520 iters); regenerate drafts; rerun E2 arms + E7 draft cells; add a judge-bias control (0W/0T over 73 judgments warrants a reference-vs-paraphrase sanity cell).
